title: diphyllocalyx armatus
intro: Diphyllocalyx armatus, also known as the armate diphyllocalyx, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly referred to as citrus or rue family. Traditionally, Diphyllocalyx armatus has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Diphyllocalyx armatus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Diphyllocalyx armatus are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using its essential oil in aromatherapy.
